case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS FARINA FEDERICO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARINA FEDERICO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARINA FEDERICO
